choices.label: Purge the locking mechanism with an ozone-torch blast
Seal the manual bypass and retreat toward the Engineering Crawl Space
Radio Dr. Thorne to demand a chemical herbicide frequency

turns.narrative: Salt-chilled spray stings your eyes as the fibrous tendril thickens, its bioluminescent bile casting a sickly chartreuse glow across the bulkhead's failing seals. The stench of rotting brine fills your lungs while the metal beneath your boots vibrates with the rhythmic, wet thrumming of the kelp-veins. You wedge your shoulder against the shivering hydraulic lever, fighting the plant's unnatural strength to keep the corridor from flooding.

_world_bible.central_tension: Can you bypass the station's compromised AI to seal the breach before the sentient greenery mimics your voice and overrides the airlock safety protocols?
_world_bible.entry_point: The rhythmic 'thump-hiss' of the bulkhead door falters as a wet, fibrous tendril slides into the locking mechanism, spraying cold seawater across your grease-stained coveralls.

locations.description: Thick, translucent kelp-veins pulse with bioluminescent bile as they constrict the primary oxygen scrubbers.
locations.name: the_wet_works

locations.description: The six-inch thick acrylic panes groan under seven tons of pressure, spider-webbed with hairline fractures where the flora has begun to burrow.
locations.name: observation_bubble_delta

locations.description: Oil-slicked seawater laps at your ankles while the smell of ozone and rotting brine chokes the narrow titanium corridor.
locations.name: engineering_crawl_space

locations.description: Massive iron counterweights hang motionless, strangled by emerald vines that have learned to mimic the station's hydraulic locking sounds.
locations.name: the_ballast_vault

npcs.description: Lead Xenobotanist with frantic, bloodshot eyes.
npcs.motivation: To protect the 'specimen' even as it digests the station's hull.
npcs.name: Dr. Aris Thorne

npcs.description: A man missing two fingers to a snapping kelp-pod.
npcs.motivation: To ignite the emergency scuttling charges and end the nightmare.
npcs.name: Quartermaster Elias

vars.name: Adventurer
vars.world_theme: Deep-sea research station overrun by sentient anomalous kelp

turns.action_sent: Purge the locking mechanism with an ozone-torch blast

choices.label: Hack through the kelp with your damaged ozone torch
Seal the secondary pressure valve to stall the flood
Radio Dr. Thorne to demand an emergency chemical purge

turns.narrative: Seawater stings your eyes as the fibrous tendril thickens, its bioluminescent bile casting a sickly yellow glow across the buckled bulkhead. You wrench the manual override lever, but it groans against the strength of the constricting kelp-veins pulsing within the machinery. The smell of ozone from your sparking torch mingles with the stench of rotting brine as the floor plates begin to tilt.

_story_arc.tension: The bulkhead door is failing, and the rising floodwater threatens to sweep you into the heart of the kelp-choked scrubbers.
unresolved_threads: The failing integrity of the primary oxygen scrubbers
Quartermaster Elias's radio silence regarding the scuttling charges

_world_bible.entry_point: The rhythmic 'thump-hiss' of the bulkhead door falters as a wet, fibrous tendril slides into the locking mechanism, spraying cold seawater across your grease-stained coveralls.

turns.action_sent: Hack through the kelp with your damaged ozone torch

choices.label: Wrench the manual override wheel to seal the inner hatch
Dive into the rising water to recover Dr. Thorne’s dropped data-slate
Climb the vibrating scrubber vents to reach the engineering crawl space

turns.narrative: The fibrous tendril snaps tight, shearing the bulkhead's locking pins with a metallic scream that vibrates through your marrow. Seawater surges past the threshold, smelling of copper and ancient rot, as you scramble backward into the pulsing, bioluminescent glow of the Wet Works. Giant kelp-veins thrum against the oxygen scrubbers, their rhythmic contractions mimicking a massive, underwater heartbeat.

_story_arc.tension: The freezing seawater is rising rapidly, threatening to drown you or sweep you into the constricting kelp-veins of the scrubbers.
unresolved_threads: Quartermaster Elias's silence regarding the scuttling charges
The source of the bile-colored light within the kelp-veins
